asset_name: Tesamorelin Visceral and Liver Fat Randomised Clinical Evidence
status: PRIMARY METADATA CONFIRMED — COMPLETE EXTRACTION OPEN

publication.title: Effect of tesamorelin on visceral fat and liver fat in HIV-infected patients with abdominal fat accumulation: a randomized clinical trial

study_design: Randomised clinical trial evaluating visceral adipose tissue and hepatic fat in HIV-infected adults with abdominal fat accumulation.
population_or_model: Adults living with HIV and abdominal fat accumulation.
intervention_or_exposure: Tesamorelin versus placebo; detailed treatment schedule remains tied to the primary article and is not reproduced as guidance.
outcomes: The publication supports study of both visceral and hepatic fat outcomes.
Precise effect sizes remain open pending complete direct extraction.
limitations: Full primary article was not captured in Build 0018.
Population-specific evidence does not validate general anti-obesity or anti-ageing use.
permitted_claims: Tesamorelin has randomised human evidence involving visceral and liver-fat outcomes in a defined HIV population.
prohibited_claims: Transfer to non-HIV populations without separate evidence.
source_closure: PRIMARY IDENTITY, DOI AND PMID CONFIRMED — COMPLETE DIRECT EXTRACTION OPEN
